description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a covered carport, a small landscaped area, and a prominent entryway with a wooden door and overhang. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with some darker accents and glass elements for windows. The structure appears to be a single-story building with a compact footprint, likely intended for urban or suburban environments. The side and rear views show minimal window openings and a continuous perimeter wall, emphasizing privacy. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, covered carport, and minimalist white and gray exterior. Features clean lines, a prominent entryway, and small landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entryway with overhang, and a small landscaped section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, continuous perimeter wall, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall and limited architectural detailing, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, flat roof, and enclosed outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wooden door, and adjacent covered carport; minimal steps and clean, geometric lines.
